failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG DES exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure feed reservoir is pressurized to maintain inlet pressure above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of TBAB/EG DES or contaminants
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular filtration and monitoring of feed solvent quality

failure_modes.cause: Failure of BPR leading to excessive pressure buildup
failure_modes.mitigation: Regular maintenance and testing of BPR functionality

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Monitor pump performance under varying temperatures and pressures to assess cavitation risk
Conduct a filtration test to evaluate the impact of potential precipitates on flow
Perform a pressure test to ensure BPR operates correctly under maximum expected conditions
